CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK(SBQQ__EndDate__c), DATE( YEAR(ADDMONTHS(SBQQ__Quote__r.SBQQ__StartDate__c, SBQQ__Quote__r.SBQQ__SubscriptionTerm__c)), MONTH(ADDMONTHS(SBQQ__Quote__r.SBQQ__StartDate__c, SBQQ__Quote__r.SBQQ__SubscriptionTerm__c)), MIN( DAY(SBQQ__Quote__r.SBQQ__StartDate__c), CASE( MONTH(ADDMONTHS(SBQQ__Quote__r.SBQQ__StartDate__c, SBQQ__Quote__r.SBQQ__SubscriptionTerm__c)), 2, IF( MOD(YEAR(ADDMONTHS(SBQQ__Quote__r.SBQQ__StartDate__c, SBQQ__Quote__r.SBQQ__SubscriptionTerm__c)), 4) = 0 && (MOD(YEAR(ADDMONTHS(SBQQ__Quote__r.SBQQ__StartDate__c, SBQQ__Quote__r.SBQQ__SubscriptionTerm__c)), 100) != 0 || MOD(YEAR(ADDMONTHS(SBQQ__Quote__r.SBQQ__StartDate__c, SBQQ__Quote__r.SBQQ__SubscriptionTerm__c)), 400) = 0), 29, 28 ), 4, 30, 6, 30, 9, 30, 11, 30, 31 ) ) ) - 1, SBQQ__EndDate__c )
CustomField.label: End Date Output
